Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: Represents an employee in the system.

name.description: The full name of the employee.

position.description: The job title or position of the employee.

joinDate.description: The date the employee started working.

loanLimit.description: The maximum amount of debt the employee can have. Defaults to their monthly salary if not set.

status.description: The employment status of the employee.

paymentAccounts.description: A list of the employee's bank accounts or e-wallets for payroll.

provider.description: The name of the bank or e-wallet (e.g., BCA, Mandiri, DANA, OVO).

accountNumber.description: The account number or e-wallet phone number.

accountName.description: The name of the account holder, as registered with the provider.

Loan.title: Loan
Loan.description: Represents a salary advance or loan taken by an employee.

date.description: The date the loan was taken.

amount.description: The original amount of the loan.

remainingAmount.description: The current unpaid balance of the loan.

description.description: Reason or description for the loan.

status.description: The current status of the loan.

repaidAt.description: The timestamp when the loan was settled.

payslipId.description: Reference to the latest payslip where this loan was partially or fully deducted.

AttendanceRecord.title: AttendanceRecord
AttendanceRecord.description: Records an employee's clock-in and clock-out times for a specific period.

employeeId.description: Reference to the Employee who made this attendance record.

clockIn.description: The date and time when the employee clocked in.

clockOut.description: The date and time when the employee clocked out. This can be null if the employee has not yet clocked out.

notes.description: Optional notes or remarks for this attendance record.

AbsenceRecord.title: AbsenceRecord
AbsenceRecord.description: Records an employee's absence for a specific day (e.g., sick, permit).

employeeId.description: Reference to the Employee who is absent.

date.description: The date of the absence in YYYY-MM-DD format.

notes.description: Optional notes or remarks for this absence record.

Payroll.title: Payroll
Payroll.description: Represents a payroll run for a specific period.

period.description: The payroll period, formatted as YYYY-MM.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the payroll was created.

status.description: The status of the payroll run.

Payslip.title: Payslip
Payslip.description: Represents an individual employee's payslip for a specific payroll period.

employeeName.description: The name of the employee at the time of payroll.

baseSalary.description: The employee's base salary for the period.

bonuses.description: A list of bonus details applied in this payslip.

lateCount.description: Number of times the employee was late during the period.

lateDeduction.description: Total deduction amount for being late.

unpaidAbsenceCount.description: Number of unpaid absence days (sakit, izin, alpa).

unpaidAbsenceDeduction.description: Total deduction for unpaid absence days.

sanctionCount.description: Number of sanctions applied during the period.

sanctions.description: A list of sanction details applied in this payslip.

deduction.description: The deduction amount for the sanction.

loanDeduction.description: Total amount of loans deducted from this payslip.

netSalary.description: The final net salary after all deductions and bonuses.

paidAmount.description: The total amount of salary that has been paid for this payslip.

remainingAmount.description: The remaining unpaid salary for this period (netSalary - paidAmount).

paymentStatus.description: The payment status of the payslip.

Sanction.title: Sanction
Sanction.description: Represents a disciplinary sanction or penalty for an employee.

employeeId.description: Reference to the Employee receiving the sanction.

date.description: The date the sanction was issued.

violation.description: A short description of the violation.

deduction.description: The monetary deduction amount for this sanction.

Bonus.title: Bonus
Bonus.description: Represents a bonus or additional income for an employee.

employeeId.description: Reference to the Employee receiving the bonus.

date.description: The date the bonus was given.

amount.description: The monetary amount for this bonus.

Setting.title: Setting
Setting.description: Stores application-wide settings, like payroll configurations.

lateDeductionAmount.description: The deduction amount in IDR for each instance of being late.

lateThresholdTime.description: The time threshold after which an employee is considered late (e.g., '07:35').

alpaDeductionAmount.description: The deduction amount in IDR for each instance of being absent without permission (alpa).

deductUnpaidAbsence.description: If true, deducts salary for any absence (sick, permit, alpa) based on daily wage.

Holiday.title: Holiday
Holiday.description: Represents a public or company holiday.

date.description: The date of the holiday in YYYY-MM-DD format.

description.description: The name or description of the holiday (e.g., 'New Year''s Day').

Savings.title: Savings
Savings.description: Stores an employee's total savings balance.

balance.description: The current total savings balance for the employee.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last update to the balance.

SavingsTransaction.title: SavingsTransaction
SavingsTransaction.description: Records a single transaction (deposit or withdrawal) for an employee's savings account.

amount.description: The amount of the transaction. Always positive.

description.description: A description of the transaction, e.g., 'Setoran dari Gaji Oktober 2024'.

sourcePayslipId.description: Optional reference to the payslip ID if the deposit is from a payroll run.

definition.description: Stores all attendance records (clock-in/clock-out) for all employees in a single collection for easier querying.
Stores all salary advances/loans for employees.
Stores all disciplinary sanctions for all employees.
Stores all bonuses for all employees.
Stores payroll runs for each period.
Stores individual employee payslips for a given payroll run.
Stores application settings. A single document with ID 'payroll' holds payroll-related configurations.
Stores all public and company holidays.
Stores employee savings balances. The document ID is the employee ID.
Stores all savings transactions for all employees.
